## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated.
- [ ] Fixtures added or updated when analyzer behavior changed.
- [ ] Documentation updated when commands, rules, or outputs changed.
- [ ] No commercial code added to the OSS core.
- [ ] No analyzer behavior changed unless this PR intentionally changes it.
- [ ] No new advanced architecture dependency added without discussion.
- [ ] Finding evidence chains remain complete.
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes.
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes.
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes.
- [ ] `pnpm analyze:demo` passes.

## Notes for reviewers

Add anything reviewers should know.
